note: Hand-entered DC Memorial Day weekend events (May 23-25, 2026). Confirm details on each venue's site before going.

events.title: National Memorial Day Concert
events.description: Free concert on the West Lawn of the U.S. Capitol, broadcast nationally. Hosted by Gary Sinise and Esai Morales, with the National Symphony Orchestra, military choruses, and award-winning artists.

events.title: National Memorial Day Parade
events.description: America's largest Memorial Day parade. Special performances begin at 9am; parade steps off at 10am, traveling along Constitution Avenue from 7th to 17th Streets NW.

events.title: Arlington National Cemetery Memorial Day Observance
events.description: The 158th National Memorial Day Observance. A joint service team conducts a wreath-laying ceremony at the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, followed by a parade of colors and remarks from military leaders.

events.title: Rolling to Remember Motorcycle Rally
events.description: Annual motorcycle ride honoring veterans, POWs/MIAs, and fallen service members. Rides through DC over Memorial Day weekend.
